articles.title: Disgraced Influencer James Charles "Apologizes" To The Spirit Airlines Employee He Trashed on TikTok
articles.description: A follow up to this post . Disgraced beauty influencer, James Charles, has walked back his original TikTok video in which he shamed and completely trashed a Spirit Airlines employee who was laid off and shared a GoFundMe link. "This video was fucking stupid," he said. "It was rude, it was obnoxious, it was privileged, and most importantly, it was completely fucking unnecessary." "It was obnoxious, and I shamed her for asking for help in a situation where she was clearly really struggling, and this could have been her absolute last resort," he added. "I feel awful because that wasn't my intention," he had the audacity to say, "and I really hurt a lot of people... I'm super sorry, especially to the woman from Spirit Airlines." He claims he tried looking for her original message, but couldn't find it. He then asks her directly in the video that if she would like to get in contact with him, to reach out to him, so he could apologize to her directly and help her out financially. But he understands if she isn't comfortable doing that now after the fact. He remains garbage. his apology video😭 https://t.co/A3hdNmTAxN pic.twitter.com/5L2GIkJ7Z6 — danny🫧💚 (@beyoncegarden) May 9, 2026 Source
